title: Perfect Medieval MC
description: This modpack took place in medieval time, where you started as an explorer and climb the ranks on your own (or with your army). Expand!
body:
This modpack allows you to transform into a explorer in medieval mincraft. Then, you will slowly climb the ranks by recruiting troops, workers and build your own kingdom. Invade, throw crusades or settle and develop. Carve your own legacy!
Warning: Can be heavy
Credits:
- cesarzorak (mandala GUI)
- Cicadabluw (chimes and longwings mods)
- yoru_no_taiyo (Playtester)
Important: If you found any issues running the modpack, send me an email via ch.m1.2.timmy@gmail.com But before doing so, if you installed alpha (not pre-alpha) or beta versions, please disable apple crates.
